name: io.github.OWNER/socioeconomic-data-mcp
description: Unified MCP access to the world's official socio-economic data — Eurostat, World Bank, OECD, IMF, FRED, ECB, ILOSTAT, UN SDG, WHO, OWID, JRC ARDECO, plus DBnomics (~50 more providers) and any SDMX endpoint — one interface, full provenance, no invented values.
